source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 3. 3차 CE TCF 보안사항 제출 (12월10일)/12. Critical_Components/A-TCF-5-018_Critical_Components_List_2020303.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Critical Components List A-TCF-5-018 Rev.1 for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides the critical component list, technical ratings, applicable standards, marks, certificates of conformity, and patient-contact status for detector and power supply components.
keyPoints: Document overview states this is the Critical Components List of the HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC.
Revision history shows Rev.0 established JUN/27/2019 and Rev.1 dated MAR/03/2020 for correction of audit points.
Critical components include regional power cord sets, power supply components, detector enclosure and carbon cover, PCBs, RTC, and coin battery.
The table marks listed components as not contacting the patient body.

evidence.claim: Supplementary information states marks assure the agreed level of surveillance and should be verified using licenses and certificates of conformity.
evidence.evidenceText: Indicates a mark which assures the agreed level of surveillance. See Licenses and Certificates of Conformity for verification.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not explicitly stated in the source text; source metadata signals FDA while the source path references CE MDD.
Document owner/manufacturer spelling appears inconsistently as H&abyz CO.,LTD. and H&Abyz Co., Ltd.
Some OCR text appears imperfect, including phrases such as 'Min. think' for metal enclosure thickness.
